cli 0.0.1
Copyright (C) 2021 LoxSmoke

  sample      Generate the sample command line definition file.

  inline      Generate command line options class

  generate    Generate command line options classes from definition file

  help        Display more information on a specific command.

result.stderr:
cli 0.0.1
Copyright (C) 2021 LoxSmoke

  -f, --force        Overwrite already existing class files.

  -v, --verbose      Show detailed info when generating code.

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.

  file (pos. 0)      Required. The input file containing command line
                     definition.

  output (pos. 1)    Output path for generated file(s).
